Bold large rounded Chinese text centered on card in two lines: "基金净值" and "vs 份额". Top-left corner of card: small gold ¥ coin decoration. Bottom-right corner: small chibi pixel art orange cat (very large round head, golden coin ¥ eyes, red UP coin floating above forehead, one paw pointing up, thoughtful expression with tiny pixel lightbulb, rosy cheeks) peeking up from card edge with only head and tiny paws visible. Tiny pixel fish and gold coin sparkles near cat. Clean composition, cat is small accent (~1/8 of image), text dominates. All text in Chinese only except UP on the coin.

Image size: 960x1280
